parameters.description: Bogus Creek (Siskiyou Co.), a Klamath River tributary near Hornbrook that is an important Chinook and coho salmon spawning stream, does not have its own listed season/bag table. Anglers must instead follow the special regulations set for the Klamath River in 14 CCR §7.40(b)(50), which governs anadromous waters of the Klamath River basin.

regulations.humanSummary: Bogus Creek has no independent season/bag rule; it follows the Klamath River special regulations table at 7.40(b)(50)
regulations.verbatimText: Bogus Creek (Siskiyou Co.). See Klamath River, subsection (b)(50).

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
